examples: She wore a sleeveless silk dress.
It was a sleeveless, long white eyelet gown with a scoop neck.
The suit is sleeveless, since astronauts' arms don't significantly deteriorate in space.
Ladies trying to brave the cool temperaturess in sleeveless dresses probably would welcome jackets.
Officers said they were looking for a man in the area wearing a sleeveless, yellow high-visibility jacket.
